title: anthemis rouyi
intro: Anthemis rouyi, also known as the Chrysanthemum or False chamomile, is a type of flowering plant in the daisy family. It has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, including its anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties, which have been shown to help soothe skin irritations and reduce pain. The health benefits of Anthemis rouyi include its ability to calm the digestive system, reduce anxiety and stress, and promote a good night's sleep. In herbal preparations, Anthemis rouyi is often used to make teas, infusions, and topical creams, and can also be used as a natural remedy for skin conditions such as eczema and acne.
